services.name: ollama
services.notes: Remote Ollama API exposure is disabled unless ENABLE_REMOTE_OLLAMA=true.

services.name: anythingllm
services.notes: Authentication must be completed in the AnythingLLM UI where supported. Desktop AppImage may not expose a LAN web server.

services.name: openwebui
services.notes: Open WebUI normally requires first user/admin account creation. Store persistent data on USB.

services.name: guide-webui
services.notes: Uses GUIDE_WEBUI_USER plus GUIDE_WEBUI_PASSWORD or GUIDE_WEBUI_PASSWORD_FILE. If neither password source is set, a local config/guide-webui.password file is generated on first run.

services.name: chromadb
services.notes: Preserve vector stores and back up before migrations.
